content.text: CSIR-CCMB Tech. Officer, Technician, Driver Vacancy 2026 : Get complete details about Technical Officer, Technician, Driver Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: CSIR-Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology, Hyderabad (Telangana) Technical Officer, Technician, Driver Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 03/2026 & 04/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 28/04/2026 Starting Date : 28/04/2026 Last Date : 26/05/2026 11:59 PM Send Hard Copy : Upto 05/06/2026 06 PM
Gen / OBC / EWS : 500/- SC / ST / All Females : 0/- ESM / PH (Divyang) : 0/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
For Driver Post : 18-27 Years Technical Officer : 18-30 Years Technician (Gr. II) : 18-28 Years The Age Limit as on : 26/05/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Skill Test (Post Wise) Medical Examination Document Verification
Technical Officer : Level-07 (Rs. 91,070/-) Technician : Level-02 (Rs. 39,970/-) Driver : Level-02 (Rs. 39,970/-)

Technical Officer : M.Sc. in Hospitality Administration/ Management (55% Marks). Technician : 10th Passed, ITI / Experience in Relevant Trade. Driver : 10th Passed, Valid LMV & HMV License with 03 Years Driving Experience.

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Technical Officer : M.Sc. in Hospitality Administration/ Management (55% Marks).
Technician : 10th Passed, ITI / Experience in Relevant Trade.
Driver : 10th Passed, Valid LMV & HMV License with 03 Years Driving Experience.

rows.text: Send Application Printout along with Required Document To The Section Officer (Recruitment Section), CSIR-Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology, Uppal Road, Habsiguda, Hyderabad – 500007, Telangana The candidates should mention on the top of the envelope “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ————- (Post Code: —————)”
